title: Autonomous Visual Defect Detection System
subtitle: End-to-end computer vision pipeline for real-time quality assurance on high-speed automotive production lines.
timeline: 12 weeks from pilot to multi-plant rollout
architectureSnapshot: Edge computer-vision inference across production cells with centralized model monitoring and federated update loops.

phases.label: Problem
phases.content: Legacy manual inspection could not keep pace with production speed. Defect escape rates exceeded 8%, causing costly downstream failures and warranty claims. The client needed sub-second detection across 12 defect categories.

phases.label: Architecture
items: Custom CNN architecture with attention mechanisms
Edge deployment on NVIDIA Jetson fleet
Real-time inference pipeline (<200ms)
Federated learning for cross-plant model updates

phases.label: Implementation
items: Synthetic data augmentation for rare defect classes
Model distillation for edge-optimized inference
Integration with existing SCADA and MES systems
Automated retraining on new defect patterns

phases.label: Impact
items: 97.3% defect detection accuracy (from 72%)
45% reduction in escape defects
$2.4M annual warranty cost savings
Deployed across 4 production facilities

title: Regulatory Compliance Retrieval Engine
subtitle: RAG-powered intelligent compliance system enabling instant retrieval and interpretation of regulatory requirements across jurisdictions.
architectureSnapshot: Hybrid retrieval architecture with legal-domain embeddings, re-ranking, and citation-backed generation under role-based controls.

phases.label: Problem
phases.content: A multinational fintech needed to navigate 15,000+ regulatory documents across 23 jurisdictions. Compliance teams spent 60% of their time on manual document review, leading to slow product launches and compliance gaps.

phases.label: Architecture
items: Multi-stage RAG pipeline with hybrid retrieval
Domain-tuned embedding model for legal text
Cross-encoder re-ranking with source attribution
Jurisdictional metadata filtering layer

phases.label: Implementation
items: Regulatory document ingestion pipeline (PDF, HTML, XML)
Semantic chunking with legal hierarchy preservation
Citation-backed response generation
Role-based access control and audit logging

phases.label: Impact
items: 40% faster compliance review cycles
38% reduction in compliance interpretation errors
85% user adoption within first quarter
Scaled to cover 4 new jurisdictions in 2 weeks

title: Autonomous Supply Chain Orchestration
subtitle: Multi-agent system for intelligent supply chain management - from demand forecasting to automated procurement and logistics optimization.
timeline: 14-week rollout across procurement and logistics operations
architectureSnapshot: MCP-orchestrated agent network coordinating forecasting, procurement actions, and logistics decisions with human-in-the-loop safeguards.

phases.label: Problem
phases.content: Complex multi-tier supply chain with 200+ suppliers across 8 countries. Demand forecasting errors of 25%+ caused overstock and stockout cycles. Manual coordination consumed 40+ hours per week across procurement teams.

phases.label: Architecture
items: MCP-orchestrated multi-agent ecosystem
Demand forecasting agent (time-series + external signals)
Procurement agent with automated supplier negotiation
Logistics optimization agent with constraint solver

phases.label: Implementation
items: Integration with ERP, WMS, and TMS platforms
Real-time data streams from IoT sensor network
Human-in-the-loop approval for high-value decisions
Continuous learning from outcome feedback loops

phases.label: Impact
items: 52% faster procurement-to-delivery throughput
28% reduction in inventory carrying costs
Demand forecast accuracy improved to 91%
35 hours/week saved in manual coordination

title: Clinical Knowledge Retrieval and Triage Assist
subtitle: Secure retrieval and triage support system that reduced response time for clinical protocol queries.
architectureSnapshot: Policy-aware retrieval with role-gated access and clinician-in-the-loop response validation.

phases.label: Problem
phases.content: Care teams spent excessive time navigating protocol and policy documents spread across systems, delaying time-sensitive decisions.

phases.label: Architecture
items: Clinical-policy retrieval layer with role controls
Triage assistant with confidence and citation display
Audit-ready logging for all query-response cycles

phases.label: Implementation
items: Secure ingestion of policy and care pathway documents
Structured chunking to preserve medical context
Workflow integration into existing clinical portals

phases.label: Impact
items: 34% faster protocol retrieval
27% reduction in documentation overhead
Improved consistency in protocol adherence
